title: Temple (disambiguation)
content:
{{Otheruses|Great Temple}}
{{Otheruses|Jedi Temple}}
{{Otheruses|Sith temple}}
'''Temples''' were places of worship and study for various organizations. You may be looking for one of the following temples:

==[[Canon]]==
*[[Boba Fett's Palace|B'omarr monastery]] on [[Tatooine]]
*[[Temple of Eedit]] on [[Devaron]]
*[[Temple of the True Vine]]
*[[Temple of Central Isopter]]
*[[Force-henge]] on [[Tython]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*[[Jabba's Palace/Legends|B'omarr monastery]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]
*[[Dark Force Temple]] on [[Dromund Kaas/Legends|Dromund Kaas]]
*The [[Hidden Temple]]
*[[Temple of Fire]] on Yavin IV
*[[Temple of Pomojema]] on [[Mimban/Legends|Mimban]]
*[[Temple of the Ancients]] on [[Lehon/Legends|Lehon]]
*[[Temple of the Blueleaf Cluster/Legends|Temple of the Blueleaf Cluster]] on Yavin IV
*[[Temple of the Creator]] on Coruscant
*[[Temple of Exar Kun]] on Yavin IV
*[[Temple of the Infinite Spirit]] on [[J't'p'tan]]
*[[Temple of the Modeler]] on Coruscant
*[[Temple of Pain]] in the [[Tascollan Nebula/Legends|Tascollan Nebula]]
*[[Temples of Vormijj]] on [[Pamorjal]]

{{Disambig}}
